summary: Slot Generation Timezone Bug Fix Verification Complete - All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed slots display correctly in IST timezone. Bug fix verified: Therapist availability times (IST) now correctly generate appointment slots starting at the configured times.
seed_data_creation: Test appointments and blocked times created with TEST_ prefix during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slot generation timezone bug has been fixed and verified. The backend now correctly treats availability times as IST and generates slots accordingly.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Timing mismatch between Weekly Availability settings and available appointment slots - slots showed different start/end times than configured availability blocks
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Backend was treating IST availability times as UTC in slot generation
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added IST timezone (Asia/Kolkata) constant, treating time_blocks as IST times, converting to UTC for comparison with stored appointments

frontend_verification.login: PASS - Successfully logged in as Therapist 1
frontend_verification.appointments_page: PASS - Shows appointments with times in 24-hour format
frontend_verification.schedule_appointment_dialog: PASS - Opens with Available Slots and Manual Entry options
frontend_verification.slot_display: PASS - For 2026-01-21 (Wednesday), first slot shows 09:00-10:00 (60 min)
frontend_verification.availability_settings_page: PASS - Shows Session Duration (60), Buffer Time (10), Wednesday enabled with 09:00-17:00

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/available-slots/{therapist_id}?date= - Slot generation with IST timezone
POST /api/appointments - Create appointment with correct times
